scripts.check: pnpm check:docs && pnpm check:architecture && turbo run check
scripts.check:architecture: depcruise --config dependency-cruiser.config.cjs apps packages scripts && node scripts/check-package-boundaries.mjs && turbo run check:architecture
scripts.check:generated: pnpm generate:openapi && git diff --exit-code -- apps/web/src/api/generated apps/web/src/routeTree.gen.ts apps/keycloak-theme/src/kc.gen.tsx packages/db/src/types.d.ts packages/files/src/gen packages/identity/src/gen packages/ops/src/gen packages/questions/src/gen packages/workbook/src/gen && git diff --cached --exit-code -- apps/web/src/api/generated apps/web/src/routeTree.gen.ts apps/keycloak-theme/src/kc.gen.tsx packages/db/src/types.d.ts packages/files/src/gen packages/identity/src/gen packages/ops/src/gen packages/questions/src/gen packages/workbook/src/gen && git status --porcelain -- apps/web/src/api/generated apps/web/src/routeTree.gen.ts apps/keycloak-theme/src/kc.gen.tsx packages/db/src/types.d.ts packages/files/src/gen packages/identity/src/gen packages/ops/src/gen packages/questions/src/gen packages/workbook/src/gen | (! grep .)
scripts.infra:config: podman compose --env-file infra/.env.example -f infra/compose-dev.yml -f infra/compose-keycloak.yml -f infra/compose-libreoffice-worker.yml -f infra/compose-realtime.yml -f infra/compose-observability.yml -f infra/compose-apps.yml config
scripts.infra:dev: podman compose --env-file infra/.env -f infra/compose-dev.yml -f infra/compose-keycloak.yml -f infra/compose-libreoffice-worker.yml -f infra/compose-realtime.yml -f infra/compose-observability.yml up --build
scripts.infra:up: podman compose --env-file infra/.env -f infra/compose-dev.yml -f infra/compose-keycloak.yml -f infra/compose-libreoffice-worker.yml -f infra/compose-realtime.yml -f infra/compose-observability.yml -f infra/compose-apps.yml up --build
scripts.infra:down: podman compose --env-file infra/.env -f infra/compose-dev.yml -f infra/compose-keycloak.yml -f infra/compose-libreoffice-worker.yml -f infra/compose-realtime.yml -f infra/compose-observability.yml -f infra/compose-apps.yml down
